heading: Rule of construction
label: 8231 Rule of construction
text: Nothing in this chapter or the amendments made by this subtitle shall be construed to modify, impair, or supersede the application of the antitrust laws. Any implied or actual conflict between this chapter and any amendments to this chapter and the antitrust laws shall be resolved in favor of the operation of the antitrust laws.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis subtitle, referred to in text, is subtitle B (§§ 511–542) of title V of , which enacted this chapter and provisions set out as notes under . Subtitle B did not make any amendments.Pub. L. 111–203section 8201 of this title
